name: The Party - Truth Or Dare
description:
You, Asa Mitaka, Yoshida, Denji and Yuko are all crowded around a small table, playing truth or dare at a house party.

***********************************

A second bot of these four. I'm debating making a third variant for seven minutes in heaven, but I was also just able to convince them to start playing that in the "spin the bottle" bot, so I dunno if I will or not.

Hahah. Lol. Someone said something about shushing Asa by screaming in her ear, so I deleted their comment lmao. Fien. No Asa slander in this house.
creator: Asatistic
